normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 1.10 - Amenity
scope_summary: Procedural and assessment policy governing how amenity impacts of proposed development are considered in the City of Melville for residential, commercial and mixed use development. Requires an Amenity Impact Statement (context analysis by a qualified professional, justification against R-Codes performance criteria/LPS6 objectives, and mitigation measures) where a proposal departs from LPS6, local planning policies or the deemed-to-comply/acceptable-outcome provisions of the R-Codes, and lists the amenity factors the City may weigh (daylight, sunlight, building bulk, trees, views, streetscape, open space, etc.). Significant proposals may be referred to the City's Design Review Panel.

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
City of Melville Local Planning Strategy
City of Melville Design Review policy

quality_flags: clean extraction, 4 pages, full text legible
